hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph available. For architecture/cross-cutting questions, use /graphify query instead of raw file search. Check graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community map."}}' || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: File modified. After finishing your current task, rebuild the graph: for code files run python -c \"from graphify.watch import _rebuild_code; from pathlib import Path; _rebuild_code(Path(\x27.\x27))\" — for docs/configs run /graphify --update"}}'
